highlights.text: Institutions tell us, by putting in my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
I wrote the day before that, “Failed Breakdowns of 5493 would be of interest” to long.

I wrote in my Thursday 2:30PM newsletter that: “One setup is if we put in a Failed Breakdown of today’s 10:20AM low at 5628.” We recovered it Thursday evening - putting in a Failed Breakdown - and were off for another ~100 point leg up Friday to 5720+ target.
The question for today, was would the dip be bought again with another Failed Breakdown?

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into the Failed Breakdown setup we had Thursday evening on the recovery of 5628 that gave us Friday’s monster squeeze, and I’ll also discuss my Trailing Stop Methodology in detail.

post_title: SPX Finally Snaps Its 9 Green Day Streak. More Red Ahead? May 6 Plan
